requirement_text: RTI shall support federate connection federation creation federation joining resignation and disconnection as distinct lifecycle states
A federate shall connect before creating or joining a federation execution
A federate shall disconnect when it has resigned and has no further intent to create or join federation executions
RTI shall support callback delivery according to the selected callback model
RTI shall allow one application to participate as multiple joined federates
RTI shall allow one application to participate in multiple federation executions
RTI shall support federation save and restore coordination
RTI shall preserve queued messages required for federation save restore
RTI shall track each synchronization point independently
RTI shall retain and combine FOM Document Data from FOM modules
RTI shall provide the standard MIM automatically when required
RTI shall reject invalid or incompatible FOM modules
If a FOM module or MIM definition is rejected the RTI shall reject it in entirety
RTI shall provide access to the current FDD individual FOM modules and the MIM
RTI shall detect lost federates and report them through MOM
RTI shall resign lost federates using the current automatic resign directive
RTI shall provide a Connect service
RTI shall provide a Disconnect service
RTI shall provide Create Federation Execution
RTI shall provide Destroy Federation Execution
RTI shall provide Join Federation Execution
RTI shall provide Resign Federation Execution
RTI shall provide Register Federation Synchronization Point
RTI shall confirm federation synchronization point registration success or failure
RTI shall announce synchronization points to the appropriate federates
RTI shall provide Synchronization Point Achieved
RTI shall notify federates when a synchronization point is achieved federation wide
RTI shall not invoke federationSynchronized until all required federates for an open whole-federation synchronization point have achieved the point
RTI shall provide Request Federation Save
RTI shall notify each participating federate to initiate save
RTI shall provide Federate Save Begun
RTI shall provide Federate Save Complete and Federate Save Not Complete
RTI shall report Federation Saved or Federation Not Saved according to save outcome
RTI shall provide Abort Federation Save
RTI shall provide Query Federation Save Status
RTI shall report federation save status through Federation Save Status Response
RTI shall provide Request Federation Restore
RTI shall confirm federation restoration request success or failure
RTI shall report when federation restore has begun
RTI shall notify each participating federate to initiate restore
RTI shall provide Federate Restore Complete and Federate Restore Not Complete
RTI shall report Federation Restored or Federation Not Restored according to restore outcome
RTI shall provide Abort Federation Restore
RTI shall provide Query Federation Restore Status
RTI shall report federation restore status through Federation Restore Status Response
RTI shall represent modeled time as points on the HLA time axis
RTI shall coordinate logical time advancement with object updates and interactions
RTI shall treat attribute updates interactions object deletes and DDM region messages as HLA messages
Each message shall be either timestamp order TSO or receive order RO
RTI shall determine sent message order type from preferred order type timestamp presence and federate time status
RTI shall never convert RO messages into received TSO messages
RTI shall deliver received TSO messages in timestamp order except where flush queue behavior applies
Each joined federate shall have a logical time
A joined federate logical time shall only advance
RTI shall advance logical time only by issuing Time Advance Grant
Only time regulating federates may send TSO messages
A time regulating federate shall provide nonnegative lookahead
A time regulating federate shall not send TSO messages earlier than allowed by logical time plus lookahead
Only time constrained federates may receive TSO messages
RTI shall use GALT to constrain time advancement
RTI shall expose LITS semantics for least incoming timestamp
RTI shall support time advance request services and grant only when delivery guarantees are satisfied
RTI shall queue pending TSO and RO messages until eligible for delivery
RTI shall provide Enable Time Regulation
RTI shall invoke timeRegulationEnabled when Enable Time Regulation succeeds
RTI shall not invoke timeRegulationEnabled when Enable Time Regulation is rejected
RTI shall provide Disable Time Regulation
RTI shall provide Enable Time Constrained
RTI shall invoke timeConstrainedEnabled when Enable Time Constrained succeeds
RTI shall not invoke timeConstrainedEnabled when Enable Time Constrained is rejected
RTI shall provide Disable Time Constrained
RTI shall provide Time Advance Request
RTI shall invoke Time Advance Grant when a Time Advance Request succeeds and grant conditions are satisfied
RTI shall not invoke Time Advance Grant before a Time Advance Request becomes eligible to grant or when the request is rejected
RTI shall provide Next Message Request
RTI shall provide Flush Queue Request
RTI shall provide Query GALT
RTI shall provide Query Logical Time
RTI shall provide Query LITS
RTI shall provide Modify Lookahead
RTI shall provide Retract
RTI shall expose management information through standard MOM objects and interactions
MOM shall use the OMT format
FDD for a federation execution shall include all MOM elements
MOM object classes interaction classes attributes and parameters shall be predefined in the FDD
MOM definitions shall not be revised though they may be extended
RTI shall publish MOM object classes required by the standard
RTI shall register one MOM federate object instance for each joined federate
RTI shall register one MOM federation object instance for the federation execution
RTI shall periodically update MOM object attributes according to timing data
MOM object classes may be extended by subclasses or additional attributes
RTI shall not subscribe to any MOM object class
RTI shall not divest ownership of standard MOM instance attributes
RTI shall support MOM interaction classes according to their defined roles
RTI shall act on MOM adjustment interactions
RTI shall act on MOM request interactions by sending corresponding report interactions
RTI shall send MOM report interactions
RTI shall act on MOM service interactions by invoking HLA services on behalf of another federate
RTI shall not emit the corresponding positive MOM report interaction when a MOM request action or federate-sent MOM report interaction is rejected
RTI shall publish MOM report interactions at the leaf class level
RTI shall ignore added nonstandard parameters when receiving MOM interactions
RTI shall apply MOM-specific RTI characteristics defined by the standard rather than behaving as a normal joined federate
RTI shall publish all MOM leaf object classes designated as published in the MOM tables
RTI shall publish all required attributes for published MOM object classes
RTI shall publish all MOM leaf interaction classes designated as published
RTI shall subscribe to MOM leaf interaction classes designated as subscribed
RTI shall be neither time regulating nor time constrained
RTI shall never provide timestamps or retraction handles for MOM messages
RTI shall not engage in ownership transfer of MOM instance attributes
RTI shall not modify transportation or order type of MOM attributes or interactions
RTI shall not use DDM services with MOM except where specifically defined
RTI shall send service invocation reports when service reporting is enabled
RTI shall determine each federate service reporting behavior from the service reporting switch state
RTI shall not emit HLAreportServiceInvocation when the triggering MOM adjustment or request is rejected before the corresponding service action succeeds
RTI shall report standard MOM exception information when exception reporting is enabled
MOM table information shall appear in all compliant FOMs and shall not be altered
